name: Neto Integration
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Users can avail themselves of "},{"text":"Neto","bold":true},{"text":" integration services to import contact and order data from their Neto accounts to their Service Cloud accounts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Integration Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With the help of this integration, data such as customer details, order history, cart information, subscription status, etc., is captured and synced with your Service Cloud account."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Important Note","bold":true},{"text":": Although customer and order data are synced from Neto, the contacts who have subscribed to only newsletters and have not created an account will not be imported. You can connect multiple Neto accounts to a single Service Cloud account. However, you cannot connect a Neto account to multiple Service Cloud accounts."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The table below shows what information is synchronized between Neto and Service To learn more about such features, visit and read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/48-integration-with-neto-by-maropost","children":[{"text":"Neto Integration","bold":true}]},{"text":" exclusive for Marketing Cloud users."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You’ll be prompted to log into your Neto account (if not already logged in), and once authenticated, the integration is created."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BCQOOA3OF95Z/neto0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BCQOOA3OF95Z/neto0.png","name":"neto0.png","type":"image/png","size":59714,"width":1600,"height":923,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":345,"dateInserted":"2025-07-29T11:38:50+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Managing Neto Integrations"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once you create your Neto integrations, you can manage them from a single place. The integrations are displayed with the following information:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Shop Name:","bold":true},{"text":" Displays the name of your Neto connection."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Shop URL:","bold":true},{"text":" Displays the URL link of your Neto store."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Status:","bold":true},{"text":" Mentions whether the integration connection is either active or pending for verification."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Actions:","bold":true},{"text":" Allows you to edit the connection details or to delete them permanently."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/integration3.05T5g000017Rw2yEAC.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/integration3.05T5g000017Rw2yEAC.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
